ocr.text: In the Hapag-Lloyd 2Q FY2025 report, the Vessel Age Profile reveals that for the age group 0-5 Years, there are 25 total
vessels, comprising 20.0% of the fleet; for 6-10 Years, there are 30 vessels, representing 22.5%; for 11-15 Years, there are 35
vessels, accounting for 25.0%; and for 16+ Years, the total is 0 vessels, making the overall count 90 vessels, which is 67.5%.

The scrapping data shows that in 2023, 15 vessels were scrapped at a cost of $12.0M, with a scrapping rate of 10%; in 2024, 18
vessels were scrapped for $14.5M at a rate of 9%; in 2025, 20 vessels will be scrapped costing $16.0M with a rate of 7%,
totaling 53 scrapped vessels, costing $42.5M, and a scrapping rate of 26%.
